content.rendered:
innovative display system

designed for
maximum versatility.

Easy. Affordable. Effective.

What is
EASIFRAME

EASIFRAME® is an innovative display system designed for maximum versatility, ease of use, and professional visual impact.

Learn More

Multiple Solutions.

Products

The EASIFRAME® system offers versatile solutions for photographers seeking seamless backdrops, as well as businesses needing eye-catching commercial displays.

With interchangeable fabric skins and multiple mounting options, EASIFRAME® adapts to studios, trade shows, events, and countless other creative applications.

Explore

EASIFRAME® Curved

EASIFRAME® Standard

EASIFRAME® Picture Frame

EASIFRAME® Light Box

Accessories, parts, and more.

EXTRUSIONS

Single Sided

Lightbox Single Sided

Cube Extrusion

H Track Extrusion

Lightbox Double Sided
More Extrusions

All Three Products Are

Easy To...

01.

Install

The EASIFRAME® system sets up in under 20 minutes with included Allen keys, wall-mount brackets, or tripod adaptors for flexibility.

02.

Use

Seamless, wrinkle-free backdrop enables photography sessions with smooth fabric skins, reducing editing time and allowing subject freedom.

03.

Change

By implementing a silicone insert channel on our frames, changing fabric skins has never been easier. There is no need to steam or iron.

Guides. Videos. Instructions.

Resources

More Resources
